An extra 5% is available when paying by Zelle, and tiered bulk pricing can reach higher totals. Those depend on payment method and quantity, so they are not reflected in the prices shown here.

promotions.headline: SAMMYC boosted to 34% off

promotions.full_detail: Mile High Compounds has boosted the SAMMYC code to 35% off through Monday July 20, 2026 at 12:00am ET. Confirm final eligibility and checkout pricing directly on the vendor website.

promotions.headline: Weekend sale, two days only
promotions.short_detail: 20% off seven capsules and Buy 2 Get 1 Free on five peptides, Sun Jul 19 and Mon Jul 20.
promotions.full_detail: Disguised Alpha is running a two day weekend sale covering 20% off seven capsule products and Buy 2 Get 1 Free on five peptides. The sale runs Sunday July 19 and Monday July 20 and ends at 11:59pm Eastern. Offer scope and stacking rules are set by the vendor, confirm eligibility at checkout.

promotions.headline: New partner: Disguised Alpha
promotions.full_detail: Disguised Alpha is now a tracked vendor on mypeptideprice.com. Code SAMMYC applies 10% off sitewide.
promotions.intro_body: Disguised Alpha is now tracked on mypeptideprice.com, so their pricing appears alongside every other vendor in the comparison tables. Code SAMMYC takes 10% off sitewide.

promotions.headline: Buy 3 Get 1 Free, mix and match
promotions.short_detail: Buy any 3 products and the 4th is free, mix and match across the store. Applied automatically at checkout, no code needed. Code SAMMYC still applies on top for its standing 15% off.
promotions.full_detail: Instant Peptides is running a Buy 3 Get 1 Free mix and match promotion from Monday July 21 through Sunday July 26, ending 11:59pm Eastern. Any 3 products qualify, they do not need to match, and the free item is applied automatically in the cart with no code required. Code SAMMYC still applies on top for its standing 15% off, which is the same rate it gives outside the sale. Every order placed during the sale is entered into the vendor Build-A-Kit giveaway, with 3 winners selected at random by Instant Peptides. Giveaway terms, eligibility and winner selection are handled entirely by the vendor.

promotions.headline: 15% off sitewide, two days only
promotions.short_detail: Coffee & Peppers is running 15% off sitewide on Saturday July 25 and Sunday July 26. Code SAMMYC stacks for an additional 15% off the reduced price, for 27.75% off in total.
promotions.full_detail: Coffee & Peppers is running 15% off sitewide on Saturday July 25 and Sunday July 26. Code SAMMYC stacks for an additional 15% off the reduced price, for 27.75% off in total. First time customers can additionally stack code NEWCOFFEE20 for 20% off. Confirm eligibility at checkout.

promotions.headline: 5% off GLP compounds with SAMMYC
promotions.short_detail: Code SAMMYC applies 5% off GLP compounds.
promotions.full_detail: Disguised Alpha applies 5% off GLP compounds when using code SAMMYC. This rate is specific to GLP products and differs from their standard sitewide rate. Confirm the applicable discount at checkout.

promotions.headline: 25% off all GLP compounds
promotions.short_detail: 25% off all GLP compounds with any code, Friday through Sunday. First time buyers also receive a free 3ml BAC water.
promotions.full_detail: Disguised Alpha is running 25% off all GLP compounds from Friday July 24 at 12:01am Pacific through Sunday July 26 at 11:59pm Pacific. The discount applies with any code, including SAMMYC. First time buyers additionally receive a free 3ml BAC water. This offer is limited to GLP compounds, so pricing shown here for their other products reflects their standard rate. Confirm eligibility and final pricing at checkout.
